stages.label: Intake Started
stages.description: Initial source and memory intake has begun.

stages.label: Voice Samples Pending
stages.description: Voice samples are required before voice readiness improves.

stages.label: Voice Samples Added
stages.description: Voice samples exist in the draft state.

stages.label: Style Samples Added
stages.description: Style and tone samples exist in the draft state.

stages.label: Memory Sources Added
stages.description: Memory or source records exist in the draft state.

stages.label: Dataset Prepared
stages.description: A training dataset is prepared for future backend processing.

stages.label: Evaluation Pending
stages.description: Evaluation prompts exist but are not complete.

stages.label: Evaluation Complete
stages.description: Evaluation records have a reviewed state.

stages.label: Deployment Pending
stages.description: Deployment route is configured but inactive.

stages.label: Active
stages.description: Model is ready for active use after backend verification.

stages.label: Archived
stages.description: Model is retained but not active.
